description: Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather shoes from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperWide strap in thong style with a toe separator to hold the foot in placePadded fabric inner lining for absolute all-day comfort and styleLeather footbed for style and all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with textured leaf pattern grooves for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesslipper careUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
